title: AuthProvider blanket impls require manual method mirroring
description: When a new method is added to the AuthProvider trait, both the Box<dyn AuthProvider> and Arc<dyn AuthProvider> blanket impls in auth.rs must be manually updated. The code comments acknowledge this (lines 184-185, 208-210) but there is no compile-time enforcement. A contributor who adds a method to the trait and forgets to mirror it in either blanket impl will get a compile error only if they test the blanket-impl path — missing the Box path silently breaks any caller using a boxed provider. The maintenance consequence is: every trait extension requires touching three locations, and the blanket impls will drift out of sync across contributors.
